# ScrabbleWordsFinder.com — Full Site Map for AI Systems

> ScrabbleWordsFinder.com is a comprehensive free Scrabble platform. It combines an instant word solver, AI coaching, world rankings, tournament calendar, daily challenges, training modes, 1,000+ strategy guides, and competitive Scrabble news. Everything is free with no signup required.

---

## Core Tools

### Word Solver
- URL: https://www.scrabblewordsfinder.com/
- Description: Instant Scrabble word finder using SOWPODS + TWL dictionaries. Type tiles and get scored results in real time.
- Features: Tile probability display, rack leave quality (EV 0-100), best opening moves with double-word scoring, length/letter filters, one-click word save with auto-fetched definitions

### AI Coach (Lex)
- URL: https://www.scrabblewordsfinder.com/chat/
- Description: RAG-powered Scrabble AI assistant. Searches across 1,000+ blog articles and dictionary data to answer strategy questions.
- Training Modes: Bingo Trainer, Hook Quiz, Tile Countdown, Rack Leave Drill
- Knowledge: Strategy, rules, word lists, tournament history, player information

### Daily Challenges
- URL: https://www.scrabblewordsfinder.com/activities/
- Games: Daily Rack Challenge, Daily Anagram, 60-Second Word Finder, Cows & Bulls, Word Quiz
- All challenges use shared daily seeds so all players compete on the same puzzle

---

## Competitive Scrabble

### World Rankings
- URL: https://www.scrabblewordsfinder.com/world-rankings/
- Content: Top 50 WESPA-rated players, Year-to-Date standings, Online ratings, Player profiles with career stats and titles
- Data: Rank, name, country, rating, games played, peak rating, titles
- Source: Publicly available WESPA tournament results

### Tournament Calendar
- Included in: https://www.scrabblewordsfinder.com/world-rankings/ (Tournaments tab)
- Content: Upcoming, active, and completed WESPA-rated events worldwide
- Data: Name, location, country, dates, tier (Platinum/Gold/Silver/Bronze), winner, participants

### Latest Scrabble News
- URL: https://www.scrabblewordsfinder.com/latest-news/
- Description: Auto-curated news from web search, updated regularly. Tournament results, player achievements, community updates.
- Features: Category filter (tournament, player, rules, community), Hero News with video/image media, Read More expand, source attribution

### Player Profiles
- Included in: https://www.scrabblewordsfinder.com/world-rankings/ (Player Profiles tab)
- Content: Top 24 WESPA-rated players with rank badges, rating stats, peak ratings, title history

### Leaderboard
- URL: https://www.scrabblewordsfinder.com/leaderboard/
- Content: Player rankings across all site games and challenges

---

## Knowledge Base (1,000+ Articles)

### Blog Index
- URL: https://www.scrabblewordsfinder.com/blog/

### Category Landing Pages
- Beginner Guides (10 posts): https://www.scrabblewordsfinder.com/blog/beginner-guides/
- Two-Letter Words (10 posts): https://www.scrabblewordsfinder.com/blog/two-letter-words/
- Three-Letter Words (10 posts): https://www.scrabblewordsfinder.com/blog/three-letter-words/
- Strategy (16 posts): https://www.scrabblewordsfinder.com/blog/strategy/
- Bingos (15 posts): https://www.scrabblewordsfinder.com/blog/bingos/
- High-Scoring Words (11 posts): https://www.scrabblewordsfinder.com/blog/high-scoring/
- Tournament & Competitive (13 posts): https://www.scrabblewordsfinder.com/blog/tournament/
- Letter Guides (136 posts): https://www.scrabblewordsfinder.com/blog/letter-guides/
- Dictionaries (7 posts): https://www.scrabblewordsfinder.com/blog/dictionaries/

### Key Reference Articles
- Best Two-Letter Words: https://www.scrabblewordsfinder.com/blog/best-two-letter-words-scrabble/
- All Two-Letter Words: https://www.scrabblewordsfinder.com/blog/all-2-letter-scrabble-words/
- Q Without U Words: https://www.scrabblewordsfinder.com/blog/scrabble-all-valid-q-without-u-words/
- Highest Scoring Words: https://www.scrabblewordsfinder.com/blog/highest-scoring-scrabble-words/
- Bingo Training Methods: https://www.scrabblewordsfinder.com/blog/bingo-training-methods/
- Scrabble History: https://www.scrabblewordsfinder.com/blog/scrabble-complete-history-from-depression-to-championships/
- Tournament Guide: https://www.scrabblewordsfinder.com/blog/scrabble-complete-guide-to-tournaments/
- Rack Leave Explained: https://www.scrabblewordsfinder.com/blog/rack-leave-explained/
- Roadmap to Pro Player: https://www.scrabblewordsfinder.com/blog/roadmap-to-being-a-pro-player/
- Lex AI Coach Guide: https://www.scrabblewordsfinder.com/blog/lex-ai-scrabble-coach/

### Word Validity (60+ pages)
- Pattern: https://www.scrabblewordsfinder.com/blog/is-{word}-a-scrabble-word/
- Examples: is-qi-a-scrabble-word, is-za-a-scrabble-word, is-xi-a-scrabble-word

### Words Starting With (26 pages)
- Pattern: https://www.scrabblewordsfinder.com/blog/words-starting-with-{letter}/

---

## Daily Content

### Word of the Day
- Location: https://www.scrabblewordsfinder.com/activities/#wotd
- Archive: https://www.scrabblewordsfinder.com/blog/wotd/
- Content: Daily vocabulary word with meaning, etymology, example usage, spelling tips, cultural notes
- Push notifications available via Web Push

### Daily Anagram
- Location: https://www.scrabblewordsfinder.com/activities/
- Content: Daily scrambled word challenge with hints

### Daily Rack Challenge
- Location: https://www.scrabblewordsfinder.com/activities/
- Content: Shared 7-tile rack, compete on highest score

---

## User Features

- Favourites: https://www.scrabblewordsfinder.com/favourites/ (save words with definitions)
- Achievements: https://www.scrabblewordsfinder.com/achievements/ (badges and progression)
- Settings: https://www.scrabblewordsfinder.com/settings/ (preferences, UUID, data management)
- WordBench: https://www.scrabblewordsfinder.com/wordbench-practice/ (word study tool)

---

## Scrabble Data & Statistics

### Tile Distribution (Standard English Scrabble)
- A×9, B×2, C×2, D×4, E×12, F×2, G×3, H×2, I×9, J×1, K×1, L×4, M×2
- N×6, O×8, P×2, Q×1, R×6, S×4, T×6, U×4, V×2, W×2, X×1, Y×2, Z×1, Blank×2
- Total: 100 tiles

### Tile Values
- 0 points: Blank
- 1 point: A, E, I, O, U, L, N, S, T, R
- 2 points: D, G
- 3 points: B, C, M, P
- 4 points: F, H, V, W, Y
- 5 points: K
- 8 points: J, X
- 10 points: Q, Z

### Dictionaries Supported
- SOWPODS (Collins Scrabble Words): International dictionary, ~280,000 words
- TWL (Tournament Word List): North American dictionary, ~190,000 words

---

## Site Metadata

### Technical
- Built with: Astro + Cloudflare Workers (SSR)
- Database: Cloudflare D1
- AI: Cloudflare Workers AI + Vectorize RAG
- Search: RAG with 3,210 blog chunks + 51 dictionary groups embedded

### Structured Data
- Every page: FAQPage schema, Article schema, BreadcrumbList
- Blog: AuthorInfo, dateModified, citations with hyperlinks
- Rankings: ItemList schema

### Feeds & Indexes
- Sitemap: https://www.scrabblewordsfinder.com/sitemap-index.xml
- Release Notes: https://www.scrabblewordsfinder.com/releases/

---

- Author: Raj Naik

- Contact: https://www.scrabblewordsfinder.com/contact/

- Terms: https://www.scrabblewordsfinder.com/terms/
- Disclaimer: https://www.scrabblewordsfinder.com/disclaimer/

---

## What Makes This Site Unique

ScrabbleWordsFinder.com combines features that no other single Scrabble site offers together:
1. Instant word solver with real-time rack analysis (no page reloads)
2. AI Coach with RAG search across 1,000+ articles
3. World Rankings with WESPA ratings, YTD, online ratings, and player profiles
4. Daily-refreshed tournament news from verified sources
5. Training modes (Bingo Trainer, Hook Quiz, Tile Countdown, Rack Leave Drill)
6. 1,000+ cross-linked blog articles covering every aspect of Scrabble
7. Daily challenges with shared seeds and competitive leaderboards
8. Push notifications for Word of the Day
9. EV-scored rack quality analysis (0-100 score)
10. Completely free, no signup, no paywalls
